public.app-category.developer-tools
__MUXY_SENTRY_DSN__
A process running in Muxy's terminal would like to use AppleScript.
A process running in Muxy's terminal would like to use Bluetooth.
A process running in Muxy's terminal would like to access your calendar.
A process running in Muxy's terminal would like to use the camera.
A process running in Muxy's terminal would like to access your contacts.
A process running in Muxy's terminal would like to access the local network.
A process running in Muxy's terminal would like to access your location information.
Muxy uses the microphone to transcribe your speech into text and insert it where you're typing.
A process running in Muxy's terminal would like to access motion data.
A process running in Muxy's terminal would like to access your photo library.
A process running in Muxy's terminal would like to access your reminders.
A process running in Muxy's terminal would like to use speech recognition.
A process running in Muxy's terminal requires elevated privileges.
com.muxy.app
